description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a geometric, minimalist design with clean lines and a mix of pastel and neutral tones. The front facade is characterized by a combination of large windows, a stone accent column, and a recessed entryway, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The structure includes a prominent garage on one side, a small pool or water feature adjacent to the main building, and a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio at the rear. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn with several trees and shrubs, enhancing its suburban appeal. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped vertically and others spaced apart, contributing to the modern look. The overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior with ample natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, a glass sunroom, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, pastel and neutral colors, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stone accent column, large windows, garage, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, glass sunroom, and a small pool or water feature, with more visible greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass-enclosed sunroom, large back windows, and the spacious backyard with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side windows, the garage, and the integration of the building with the lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
